text:
I see your $3,400 ACH withdrawal placed Monday is still showing "pending review" as of Thursday. I can't speculate on the reason for the delay, but I'm flagging this to our payments ops team to look into.

To help them locate it faster, please reply with the last 4 digits of the bank account and the approximate time you submitted the request. A human will follow up once they have an update.

Novig Support
